name: My boss in Ogden says my work injury isn't covered, can I still get workers comp?
description: Yes, Utah covers job injuries; report formally despite boss—insurer decides within 21-45 days.[1]

mainEntity.name: My boss in Ogden says my work injury isn't covered, can I still get workers comp?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, Utah covers job injuries; report formally despite boss—insurer decides within 21-45 days.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, most work injuries are covered regardless of your boss's opinion if they occurred on the job.** Utah law requires employers to carry workers' comp insurance covering medical care and lost wages from day one.[1][3] Key factors: Injury must be work-related; report within 180 days; employer can't retaliate. File if denied, request a Claims Resolution Conference. Don't argue with your boss—report formally and get medical proof to secure benefits.
